name: Par 4 N More
about: Par 4 N More is a country club offering a unique golf experience for players of all skill levels. The venue features three indoor golf simulators and a full outdoor driving range. It also includes an arcade with two pool tables and a full menu restaurant available for guests while they play. The facility offers two large party rooms for private events and hosts league play on Tuesday and Thursday evenings. Memberships are available at multiple levels, providing discounts on attractions, food, drinks, and other benefits.
why_golfers_like_it: Full-service restaurant available while you play
Variety of membership options with tiered discounts
Two large private party rooms for events

food_and_drink.notes: Full menu restaurant staffed and ready to serve
Full bar available, with members receiving discounts on drinks

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, you can bring your own clubs or use the clubs provided at no extra charge.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: The venue has a full menu restaurant and bar available for guests. Outside food and drink policies are not explicitly stated.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Rates are based on 1-hour time slots per simulator bay, with up to six golfers per bay. The time to complete 18 holes will depend on the simulator software and pace of play.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is family-friendly and features an arcade and pool tables. Children under 14 must be accompanied by an adult.
